summary.what: Cut v0.19.0 release with skip-rule expansion, .timbersignore, revert auto-skip, status visibility, and template tune-ups
summary.why: Substantive feature batch (no breaking changes) accumulated since v0.18.0 — relaxed enforcement, added per-repo configurability, sharpened all seven draft templates with anti-fabrication guards, and added prime PR-authoring nudge. Semver minor bump.
summary.how: just release 0.19.0 — generated CHANGELOG entry via draft pipeline, tagged, pushed, GitHub Actions handling build/publish.
